calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Order; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Stephen G. Opperwall
Off Calendar Jan-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, or objection, the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFFS SHUKU YASUDA, YUKO YASUDA's Motion For Assignment Order is adopted as follows:

Grant. No opposition filed.

Order signed after hearing.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Denied

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing For Default Judgment Against Deft Gregory Noto
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Daniel Devoy, Esq.for Plaintiffs Shuku Yasuda and Yuki Yasuda.
Plaintiff's sworn and examinded.

No appearance by defaulted defendant Gregory Noto.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages $69,853.52
Prejudgment Interest $35.58
Costs $826.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $70,715.10.

Judgment signed in open court after modifications by Plaintiff's counsel.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Continued To Nov-28-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
